name: tripadvisor
description: TripAdvisor — page transport adapters for hotel/restaurant/attraction search and detail via LD+JSON and DOM extraction

dependencies.searchLocation → searchHotels/searchRest: searchLocation returns geoId and locationSlug for hotel and restaurant searches
dependencies.searchLocation → getRestaurant/getAttrac: searchLocation provides geoId; detail ops also need locationId and slug from listing pages
